name: tribe-trip-backend
description: Tribe Trip production-ready API foundation - Node.js + Express + Prisma

scripts.check: find src scripts -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n 1 node --check && DATABASE_URL=file:../dev.db prisma validate
scripts.db:generate:vercel: : "${DATABASE_URL:?DATABASE_URL must be set for Vercel}" && prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.vercel.prisma
scripts.db:push:vercel: : "${DATABASE_URL:?DATABASE_URL must be set for Vercel}" && prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.vercel.prisma
scripts.seed:vercel: : "${DATABASE_URL:?DATABASE_URL must be set for Vercel}" && prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.vercel.prisma && node scripts/seed-from-frontend.js
